description_long: This object is a polygonal kettle with an octagonal body and a flat, faceted surface, giving it a geometric, utilitarian appearance. The kettle features a prominent arched handle attached at two points on the top, allowing for easy lifting and pouring. A short, angular spout protrudes from one side, designed for controlled pouring of liquids. The lid is flat with a small, square knob at its center, suggesting it is removable for filling and cleaning. The base is wide and flat, providing stability when placed on surfaces. The overall design is plain, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, and the surface appears to be a uniform gray, likely representing metal.
description: A geometric, octagonal kettle with a flat lid, arched handle, and angular spout, finished in plain gray metal. The design is utilitarian and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat octagonal body, arched handle, and the lid with a central knob; the spout is not visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular spout extending from the body and the full arch of the handle above the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the kettle, handle arch, and the lid; the spout is not visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear view of the spout, handle, and flat lid with knob.
